creator: petteri.valkonen@iki.fi
text:
Created attachment 253568
Patch to update textproc/ripgrep to version 14.1.1

Changelog: https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep/releases/tag/14.1.1

Note that the patches that were introduced in 656a5046c75e3b4840e6568ea34a6aa9fa1bac87 are either obsoleted (the crate updates) by or included (the simd-accel removal) in v14.1.1.
